chapter_title.ar: حَدِيثُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ (عليه السلام) مَعَ يَزِيدَ
chapter_title.en: Hadith of Ali Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> with Yazeed<sup>la</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 240)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 240)
text: كُنَّا مَعَ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ (عليه السلام) فَاضْطَرَبَتِ الْأَرْضُ فَوَحَاهَا بِيَدِهِ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَهَا اسْكُنِي مَا لَكِ ثُمَّ الْتَفَتَ إِلَيْنَا وَ قَالَ أَمَا إِنَّهَا لَوْ كَانَتِ الَّتِي قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لَأَجَابَتْنِي وَ لَكِنْ لَيْسَتْ بِتِلْكَ.

en.hubeali: H 14814 – From him, from Salih, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Ibn Muskaan, from Abu Bakr Al-Hazramy, from Tameem Bin Haatim who said:

We were with Amir-ul-Momineenasws, so the earth became restless (tremor). So heasws gestured with hisasws hand, then said to it: ‘Calm down! What is the matter with you?’ Then heasws turned towards us and said: ‘But, had it been that (quake[26]) which Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic has Said, it would have answered measws, but it is not that one’.
en.sarwar: 367. From him, from Salih, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Ibn Muskaan, from Abu Bakr Al-Hazramy, from Tameem Bin Haatim who said: We were with Amir-ul-Momineen (a.s.), so the earth became restless (tremor). So he (a.s.) gestured with his (a.s.) hand, then said to it: ‘Calm down! What is the matter with you?’ Then he (a.s.) turned towards us and said: ‘But, had it been that (quake) which Allah (azwj) Mighty and Majestic has Said, it would have answered me (a.s.), but it is not that one’.
